channel.title: Sundorica Product Feed
channel.description: Product feed for Sundorica's Facebook Catalog.

item.g:title: Unstitched Lawn
item.g:description:
Embroidered Lawn 3 Piece Suit

  • Dyed Embroidered Lawn Center Panel 1 Piece
  • Dyed Embroidered Lawn Side Panels 2 Pieces
  • Dyed Embroidered Lawn Back 1 Piece
  • Dyed Embroidered Lawn Sleeves
  • Embroidered Motifs Border(for sleeves, trousers and back)
  • Embroidered front Daman border
  • Digital Printed Chiffon Dupatta
  • Dyed Lawn Trousers

item.g:title: Size chart 1
item.g:description:
Embroidered Lawn 3 Piece Suit

  • Dyed Embroidered Lawn Center Panel 1 Piece
  • Dyed Embroidered Lawn Side Panels 2 Pieces
  • Dyed Embroidered Lawn Back 1 Piece
  • Dyed Embroidered Lawn Sleeves
  • Embroidered Motifs Border(for sleeves, trousers and back)
  • Embroidered front Daman border
  • Digital Printed Chiffon Dupatta
  • Dyed Lawn Trousers
